items.title: Mastercard Ties Up To Advance Zain Cash's Card Suite in Jordan
items.description: MA partners with Zain Cash to expand prepaid, credit and SME card offerings of the latter while boosting digital payments in Jordan.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slides On Jobs Data As Fed Official Points To Rate Cut; Alphabet Surges To Highs (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index fell Wednesday ahead of key data. Alphabet and Apple stock surged on a court ruling.

items.title: Aspire Executive Lounges and American Express unveil co-branded lounge at YUL Montreal-Trudeau International Airport
items.description: Aspire Executive Lounges, the hospitality brand of Swissport International, has announced the opening of its latest airport lounge at YUL Montreal-Trudeau International Airport, in partnership with American Express (Amex).

items.title: Why American Express (AXP) is a Top Momentum Stock for the Long-Term
items.description: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.

items.title: Gemini Is Rolling Out an XRP Edition of Its Credit Card. Could This Give a Much-Needed Boost to Ripple?
items.author: Lyle Daly
items.description: Gemini launched an XRP-themed credit card with existing reward features. The card's release is unlikely to significantly impact XRP's value, but the upcoming SEC decision on XRP ETFs could be more influential for the cryptocurrency's performance.
